'''vawutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loaiasis|loaiasis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-w-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loaiasis|loaiasis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vawutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:væwitith|væwitith]] || [[word:væwitij|væwitij]] || [[word:væwitish|væwitish]] || [[word:væwiti|væwiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vawuwututh|vawuwututh]] || [[word:vawuwutuj|vawuwutuj]] || [[word:vawuwutush|vawuwutush]] || [[word:vawuwutu|vawuwutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vawututh|vawututh]] || [[word:vawutuj|vawutuj]] || [[word:vawutush|vawutush]] || [[word:vawutu|vawutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vawuftufth|vawuftufth]] || [[word:vawuftufj|vawuftufj]] || [[word:vawuftufsh|vawuftufsh]] || [[word:vawuftuf|vawuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vawututhu|vawututhu]] || [[word:vawutuju|vawutuju]] || [[word:vawutushu|vawutushu]] || [[word:vawutuku|vawutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vawututh|vawututh]] || [[word:vawutuj|vawutuj]] || [[word:vawutush|vawutush]] || [[word:vawutu|vawutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vawututhul|vawututhul]] || [[word:vawutujul|vawutujul]] || [[word:vawutushul|vawutushul]] || [[word:vawutukul|vawutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vawutuuthuthu|vawutuuthuthu]] || [[word:vawutuujuju|vawutuujuju]] || [[word:vawutuushushu|vawutuushushu]] || [[word:vawutuuku|vawutuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vawututhun|vawututhun]] || [[word:vawutujun|vawutujun]] || [[word:vawutushun|vawutushun]] || [[word:vawutukun|vawutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vawututhuoro|vawututhuoro]] || [[word:vawutujuoro|vawutujuoro]] || [[word:vawutushuoro|vawutushuoro]] || [[word:vawutukuoro|vawutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5bad82d}}
